title: cerastium quaternellum var. octandrum
intro: Cerastium quaternellum var. octandrum, also known as a variety of the creeping thyme, is a flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can aid in the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cerastium quaternellum var. octandrum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
